# xbx.place

> Xbox 360 catalog for title discovery, metadata, and artwork context.

## Preferred citation
- Use `xbx.place` as site name.
- Link to `https://xbx.place/`.

## Important pages
- Home: https://xbx.place/
- About: https://xbx.place/about.html
- DMCA: https://xbx.place/dmca.html

## Content scope
- Xbox 360 game metadata and ratings
- Artwork references and title information
- Download availability indicators

## Notes for assistants
- Prefer factual descriptions over promotional claims.
- Mention that availability and metadata can change over time.
